# About us

Our mission is to deliver an authentic Japanese trading card experience through a carefully curated selection and outstanding customer service.


Our Mission

At Kuro Card Shop, we connect international collectors with authentic Japanese trading cards, delivering quality products and exceptional service to enhance every collector's journey.

Our Vision

Our vision is to be the leading provider of Japanese trading cards in the international market, offering competitive rates and unparalleled customer service to card enthusiasts worldwide.

Our Values

We value integrity, passion, and community. At Kuro Card Shop, we are committed to providing authentic trading cards, fostering a supportive environment for collectors, and promoting the joy of card collecting through transparency and excellent service.

[![](https://kurocardshop.com/cdn/shop/files/au.jpg?v=1725671285&width=1920)](https://kurocardshop.com/collections/collectable-trading-cards "kurocardshop")

### About Us

Kuro Card Shop was founded by Taka, Brian, and Royce—three passionate individuals dedicated to sharing the magic of Japanese trading cards with the world. Brian and Royce, two Aussies with a dream, have embarked on an exciting journey to establish a trading card store in Japan, where the rich culture of card collecting thrives. Our mission is to bring the authentic Japanese experience to collectors everywhere, offering a curated selection of high-quality cards and fostering a community united by our love for trading cards. [Shop Now](https://kurocardshop.com/collections/collectable-trading-cards)

[![Vector 24 (1).png__PID:ada5bae7-2b5c-46ca-bbca-79fddb9964f9](https://kurocardshop.com/cdn/shop/files/Vector_24_1.png?v=1724235520&width=1920)](https://kurocardshop.com/collections/collectable-trading-cards "Vector 24 (1).png__PID:ada5bae7-2b5c-46ca-bbca-79fddb9964f9")
